## Meeting Purpose

[Explore expanded collaboration opportunities between GrowthX and Superhuman, particularly in light of Superhuman's acquisition by Grammarly.](https://fathom.video/share/XPD8TX4EcN7YUxHXxFDVstSyq1JwHLyp?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX offers a wide range of AI-powered content creation and optimization capabilities beyond SEO, including thought leadership, social media, and product marketing](https://fathom.video/share/XPD8TX4EcN7YUxHXxFDVstSyq1JwHLyp?tab=summary&timestamp=1419.0)
  - [Superhuman is undergoing a major rebrand/repositioning with Grammarly and Coda, launching a new unified platform on October 6th](https://fathom.video/share/XPD8TX4EcN7YUxHXxFDVstSyq1JwHLyp?tab=summary&timestamp=2085.0)
  - [A strategic 8-week sprint with GrowthX could help Superhuman navigate the transition and identify high-impact use cases for AI-assisted content](https://fathom.video/share/XPD8TX4EcN7YUxHXxFDVstSyq1JwHLyp?tab=summary&timestamp=2286.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's AI-Powered Content Platform (Atlas)

  - [Uses "context engineering" and artifacts to create highly customized, scalable content workflows](https://fathom.video/share/XPD8TX4EcN7YUxHXxFDVstSyq1JwHLyp?tab=summary&timestamp=626.0)
  - [Can integrate with various APIs and data sources to automate content creation](https://fathom.video/share/XPD8TX4EcN7YUxHXxFDVstSyq1JwHLyp?tab=summary&timestamp=662.0)
  - [Includes features like fact-checking, image generation, and AI-assisted editing](https://fathom.video/share/XPD8TX4EcN7YUxHXxFDVstSyq1JwHLyp?tab=summary&timestamp=1176.0)
  - [Allows for human review and refinement at each stage](https://fathom.video/share/XPD8TX4EcN7YUxHXxFDVstSyq1JwHLyp?tab=summary&timestamp=1190.0)

### Potential Use Cases for Superhuman

  - [Thought leadership content creation and repurposing](https://fathom.video/share/XPD8TX4EcN7YUxHXxFDVstSyq1JwHLyp?tab=summary&timestamp=1384.0)
  - [Social media content generation and optimization](https://fathom.video/share/XPD8TX4EcN7YUxHXxFDVstSyq1JwHLyp?tab=summary&timestamp=1429.0)
  - [Product marketing and landing page creation](https://fathom.video/share/XPD8TX4EcN7YUxHXxFDVstSyq1JwHLyp?tab=summary&timestamp=1453.0)
  - [Help center/knowledge base content management](https://fathom.video/share/XPD8TX4EcN7YUxHXxFDVstSyq1JwHLyp?tab=summary&timestamp=2422.0)
  - [Cross-linking strategy for merging multiple high-authority domains](https://fathom.video/share/XPD8TX4EcN7YUxHXxFDVstSyq1JwHLyp?tab=summary&timestamp=2719.0)

### Superhuman's Upcoming Rebrand

  - [Launching unified AI productivity platform with Grammarly and Coda on October 6th](https://fathom.video/share/XPD8TX4EcN7YUxHXxFDVstSyq1JwHLyp?tab=summary&timestamp=2218.0)
  - [Redefining ICP (Ideal Customer Profile) for all three businesses](https://fathom.video/share/XPD8TX4EcN7YUxHXxFDVstSyq1JwHLyp?tab=summary&timestamp=2101.0)
  - [Developing new positioning and narrative around AI productivity and collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/XPD8TX4EcN7YUxHXxFDVstSyq1JwHLyp?tab=summary&timestamp=2113.0)
  - [Concerns about maintaining brand equity and SEO performance during the transition](https://fathom.video/share/XPD8TX4EcN7YUxHXxFDVstSyq1JwHLyp?tab=summary&timestamp=2701.0)

### Content Strategy Considerations

  - [Need for scaled enablement, social media, and SEO content](https://fathom.video/share/XPD8TX4EcN7YUxHXxFDVstSyq1JwHLyp?tab=summary&timestamp=1435.0)
  - [Opportunity to create unique, attention-grabbing content (e.g., "email fails" or AI-generated character voices)](https://fathom.video/share/XPD8TX4EcN7YUxHXxFDVstSyq1JwHLyp?tab=summary&timestamp=1519.0)
  - [Importance of maintaining individual product funnels while building a unified platform narrative](https://fathom.video/share/XPD8TX4EcN7YUxHXxFDVstSyq1JwHLyp?tab=summary&timestamp=2272.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Superhuman team to brainstorm priority areas for potential strategic sprint with GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/XPD8TX4EcN7YUxHXxFDVstSyq1JwHLyp?tab=summary&timestamp=2884.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide written examples of input/output possibilities and workflow types](https://fathom.video/share/XPD8TX4EcN7YUxHXxFDVstSyq1JwHLyp?tab=summary&timestamp=2974.0)
  - [Explore how GrowthX can assist with content strategy for October 6th launch and beyond](https://fathom.video/share/XPD8TX4EcN7YUxHXxFDVstSyq1JwHLyp?tab=summary&timestamp=2167.0)
  - [Consider GrowthX's expertise for optimizing cross-linking and domain authority across merging properties](https://fathom.video/share/XPD8TX4EcN7YUxHXxFDVstSyq1JwHLyp?tab=summary&timestamp=2719.0)
